# Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type Of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Test
- [ ] Chore

## Safety Checklist

- [ ] No unsafe direct infrastructure call paths were added.
- [ ] Port and adapter boundaries remain intact.
- [ ] Blast-radius constraints are preserved or tightened.
- [ ] Human-approval and kill-switch behavior remains enforced where applicable.

## Release And Security Sign-off

- [ ] I assessed security impact (auth, secrets, data exposure, least privilege).
- [ ] I reviewed dependency and supply-chain impact.
- [ ] I documented release impact (breaking changes, migrations, runbooks).
- [ ] I documented rollback or mitigation steps for risky changes.
- [ ] I requested required maintainer sign-off for release-critical or security-sensitive changes.

## Validation

- [ ] Unit tests added or updated for behavior changes.
- [ ] Integration tests added or updated where relevant.
- [ ] Local checks pass (lint, type, tests).

## Documentation

- [ ] I updated relevant documentation in docs/.
- [ ] I updated openspec artifacts when behavior changed.

## Linked Work

Issue(s):

## Additional Context

Add logs, screenshots, rollout notes, or risk notes if needed.
